intended_use: MEDO-Thyroid is designed to view and quantify ultrasound thyroid image data using machine learning techniques to aid in analysis of thyroid lobes and identify thyroid nodules, including evaluation, qu
intended_use_full: MEDO-Thyroid is designed to view and quantify ultrasound thyroid image data using machine learning techniques to aid in analysis of thyroid lobes and identify thyroid nodules, including evaluation, quantification and documentation of any such nodule. The device is intended to be used on adult patient images of 18 years or older.
target_condition: thyroid nodules and thyroid lobe assessment
ground_truth: Reference measurements (not explicitly defined in summary but implied to be manual or expert measurements for comparison)
other_metrics: Thyroid lobe volume measurement ICC: 0.972 (95% CI 0.969-0.975), Maximum % Volume Error: 21.7% (95% CI 19.0-24.8). Thyroid nodule volume measurement ICC: 0.973 (95% CI 0.971-0.975), Maximum % Volume Error: 22.9% (95% CI 20.0-26.0). ICC values by subgroup for lobes: Siemens 0.974, Philips 0.963, GE 0.974. ICC values by subgroup for nodules: Siemens 0.978, Philips 0.972, GE 0.974.
